notes:
**Fixes & polish**

- **Switching back to the app keeps your cursor where you were typing.** After
  alt-tabbing away mid-edit and back, the caret could jump to the top of the
  note and the editor could lose focus (so you had to click before typing). The
  cursor position is now preserved across the background refresh that fires when
  a save lands while the window is in the background, and focus returns to the
  editor when you come back.
